analysis.reasoning: Core message: China will host COP15 in Kunming and is ready to work with all parties to ensure positive outcomes. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—cooperative, multilateral tone, willingness to work with all parties and ensure positive outcomes in a UN biodiversity conference aligns with portraying China as a constructive, multilateral actor. CH3 (epic history): Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Hosting an international conference alone does not claim governmental success or leadership across domains; no explicit success framing. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Kunming/Yunnan mentioned only as location; no cultural or natural promotion. Conclusion: Promotes CH2.
